Survival_time_Exp1.description: Survival time (in minutes) for each subject in Experiment 1 (vertical movement at 0.167 Hz, 0.111 G). Asterisk (*) denotes censored observations. Subjects 8–21 (14 subjects) all have 120* censored times. This variable and Survival_time_Exp2 are from different experiments (groups) being compared in the logrank test.

Survival_time_Exp2.description: Survival time (in minutes) for each subject in Experiment 2 (vertical movement at 0.333 Hz, 0.222 G). Asterisk (*) denotes censored observations. Subjects 16–28 (13 subjects) all have 120* censored times. This variable and Survival_time_Exp1 are from different experiments (groups) being compared in the logrank test.

Group.description: Group indicator distinguishing the two experiments being compared in the logrank test. Experiment 1 has 21 subjects and Experiment 2 has 28 subjects.
